MATTER CALLED. NO ARGUMENT IS HELD. MR. CARESS IS INFORMED THAT HE CONTESTED THE TENTATIVE RULING LATE. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM IS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES IS DENIED AS TO FORM INTERROGATORY 13.1 AND GRANTED AS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES 12.3 AND 15.1, WITH NO SANCTIONS AWARDED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-22-2021 Vacated

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Propounded Upon Defendant Russel Jacade Morton; And Monetary Sanctions In The Am Out Of $3,665.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Benny Khorsandi, Esq. In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-10-2021 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Propounded Upon Defendant Russel Jacade Morton; And Monetary Sanctions In The Am Out Of $3,665.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Benny Khorsandi, Esq. In Support Thereof
Off Calendar May-03-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. James Caress, Esq. of the Law Offices of Arash Khorsandi, PC, 310.277.7529, for Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PLAINTIFF BARTOLO SALAZAR'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Propounded Upon Defendant Russel Jacade Morton; And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,665.00.

Matter called. NO argument is held. Mr. Caress is informed by the Court that he contested the tentative ruling late, that his request was made at 9:19 a.m. this morning, that the opposing counsel is not present, and that the tentative ruling is adopted.

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses is denied as to form interrogatory 13.1 and granted as to form interrogatories 12.3 and 15.1, with no sanctions awarded.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Propounded Upon Defendant Russel Jacade Morton; And Monetary Sanctions In The Am Out Of $3,665.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Benny Khorsandi, Esq. In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-15-2021 Continued To May-03-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
David Ebenhack for Plaintiff.
Benjamin Milton Rasmusen (707-427-3998; benjamin.rasmusen@mcnamaralaw) of McNamara....Ambacher LLP for Defendant.

Plaintiff's Counsel does not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BARTOLO SALAZAR's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Propounded Upon Defendant Russel Jacade Morton; And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,665.00:
The matter is continued to May 3, 2021 at 9:30 am in Department 302, Law and Motion Department.
Judge Pro Tem to prepare report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: Michael Mau, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
